variables.notes: R.nc. Used rows outside the candidate list because the provided candidates do not cleanly capture the main recurring finance-cost components visible in the preview for 2025, and using broad 'Financial expenses' would risk mixing in non-interest items or double counting with components. Manual review recommended to confirm whether 'Purchase costs bond' and 'Arrangement fees' should be treated as recurring interest/finance costs. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Purchase costs bond, [Income Statement] Arrangement fees
